roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PRE HEARING CONFERENCE/X: PAROLE AGENTS AND ROBERT ABAKAN AND VINCENT GO ARE PRESENT/X: CHARLES BROWN APPEARNG FOR PRC/X: THE COURT IMPOSES THE 90 DAY HAMMER FROM 02-05-20/PAJ:90 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDITFOR 45 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASEAND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE CASE STATUS/ /X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE  APPEARING/X: THECOURT TAKES NOTICE THAT ALL PARTIES AGREE THAT THE DEFENDANT WAS LAST ON CALENDAR ON 2-5-20 AND RELEASED IN ERROR/X: IT WAS AGREET UPON THAT THE DEFENDANT WAS TO REMAIN IN CUSTODY UNTIL A BED BECAME AVAILABLE WITH A SUSPENDED HAMMER BECAUSE THE DEFENDANT IS STILLON A WAITING LIST FOR BED SPACE/X:THE ISSUE OF THE HAMMER WAS UNCLEAR AND THE MINUTES SHOW AN OR RELEASE WITHHAMMER CONDITIONS, HOWEVER, THE DEFENDANT WAS ORDERED BY THE COURT TO APPEAR TODAY IF OUT OF CUSTODY, THERE IS NO APPEARANCE MADE BY DEFENDANT TODAY//FTA/BWI/NB/X:PAROLE IS REVOKED,/BWNUM: 1ST/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL: PAROLE PROGRESS REPORT/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE  APPEARING/X: ACCEPTED INTO PRC TODAY/OR/X: AS A CONDITION OF PRC ACCEPTANCE A HAMMER ISSTAYED AS FOLLOWED:/X: IF COMPLETES PRC; PETITION WILL BE DISMISSED; IF NOT, DEFENDANT   WILL BE SUBJECT TO A HAMMER CONDITION OF 120 DAYS COUNTY JAIL WITH   CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED WITH TIME LOST/X: PAROLE CASE STATUS NEXTDATE/DOPU: IN A PROGRAM/CONT/
